title: Efficient and Safe Bidirectional Traffic Control in Lane-less Environments Using Global Reward and Curriculum Learning
authors: Mao Tobisawa, Tenta Suzuki, Clive Jancen Kawaoto,Yuki Itoh, Kaito Kumagae, Tomohiro Harada, Johei Matsuoka, and Kiyohiko Hattori .
venue: Proceedings of the 9th International Symposium on Swarm Behavior and Bio-Inspired Robotics 2025 (SWARM2025)
